prompt: A polished Japanese fashion magazine cover illustration in elegant contemporary editorial style, vertical full-page composition. The cover title is a huge teal serif masthead reading "AURA" across the top. In the upper right, include 4 stacked issue details: "6", "June 2025", "No.126", and a small boxed label "アウラ", followed by the price line "特別定価 ¥980". The background is a bright pale blue sky with soft white clouds. Center the portrait of an androgynous, ethereal young model, shown from chest up, wearing a crisp white tailored jacket with subtle gold piping, a white shirt, a vivid aqua-teal vest or tie layer, and a gemstone-like star brooch at the collar. The character has very long, layered, windswept hair in {argument name="hair color" default="icy white with pale aqua tint"}, with glossy strands flowing across the shoulders, and fair luminous skin. The face is largely obscured by a centered rectangular censor block in muted gray-blue to pale pink gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and upper cheeks; the visible lower face shows a soft mouth and refined chin. One hand is raised near the lips in a thoughtful fashion-portrait pose. Use delicate anime-inspired linework, airy lighting, translucent highlights, and luxury beauty-editorial rendering. Add 3 left-column cover blurbs in Japanese with teal headlines and smaller black body text: first, "透明感をまとう 初夏のスキンケア" with 2 smaller lines beneath; second, "好印象をつくる 爽やかカラー術" with 2 smaller lines beneath; third, "プロが教える 美しい髪の条件" with 2 smaller lines beneath. Add a teal circular badge on the right with 4 lines of white text: "Special Interview", "風と光と、", "自分らしさと。", and "ソラが語る 日常と美学". Near the lower center, place a small italic English line "Cover & Special Feature" above the large Japanese main headline "ソラ、という名の透明感。" with the first word in teal and the rest in black. Under that, add 2 lines of smaller Japanese subheadline text. Along the bottom edge, create 3 feature teasers with pale italic English category labels and Japanese copy beneath: left label "Fashion", center label "Beauty", right label "Trend", each with 2 short Japanese lines. Overall mood: serene, luxurious, airy, refreshing early-summer beauty fashion cover with cohesive aqua-and-white color design.
translatedPrompt: 一张精致的日系时尚杂志封面插图，采用优雅的现代编辑风格，垂直全页构图。封面标题为巨大的青色衬线字体“AURA”，横跨顶部。在右上角，包含 4 行堆叠的期刊详情：“6”、“June 2025”、“No.126”，以及一个带有小方框的标签“アウラ”，随后是价格行“特別定価 ¥980”。背景为明亮的淡蓝色天空，点缀着柔和的白云。画面中心为一位中性、空灵的年轻模特半身像，身穿剪裁利落的白色西装外套，配有精致的金色滚边、白色衬衫、鲜艳的水青色马甲或领带层，领口处佩戴一枚如宝石般的星形胸针。角色拥有非常长的层次感秀发，随风飘动，发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="冰白色带淡水青色调"}，光泽发丝垂落在肩头，皮肤白皙透亮。面部大部分被居中的矩形遮挡块遮住，遮挡块呈柔和的灰蓝色至淡粉色渐变，覆盖了眼睛、鼻子和上脸颊；可见的下半脸呈现出柔和的嘴唇和精致的下巴。一只手抬起靠近嘴唇，呈现出深思熟虑的时尚肖像姿势。使用细腻的动漫风格线条、轻盈的布光、半透明高光以及奢华的美妆编辑渲染效果。在左侧栏添加 3 条日文封面简介，配以青色标题和较小的黑色正文：第一条为“透明感をまとう 初夏のスキンケア”，下方附带 2 行小字；第二条为“好印象をつくる 爽やかカラー術”，下方附带 2 行小字；第三条为“プロが教える 美しい髪の条件”，下方附带 2 行小字。在右侧添加一个青色圆形徽章，内含 4 行白色文字：“Special Interview”、“風と光と、”、“自分らしさと。”以及“ソラが語る 日常と美学”。在下方居中位置，放置一行小的斜体英文“Cover & Special Feature”，上方为巨大的日文主标题“ソラ、という名の透明感。”，其中第一个词为青色，其余为黑色。下方添加 2 行较小的日文副标题。沿底部边缘，创建 3 个专题预告，配以淡色斜体英文分类标签和下方的日文文案：左侧标签“Fashion”，中间标签“Beauty”，右侧标签“Trend”，每项各配 2 行简短的日文。整体氛围：宁静、奢华、轻盈、清爽的初夏美妆时尚封面，采用统一的水青色与白色配色设计。

breakdown.creativeCore: 日系水色时尚杂志封面：此提示词可生成精致的动漫风格日系美妆与时尚杂志封面，适用于编辑样机、角色品牌塑造及跨媒体视觉识别。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, anime, luxury]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
